title: Point Blank Official || Blue Archive Pack
description: Official content pack for VPB that adds Blue Archive weapons
body:
![wallpaper](https://i.imgur.com/IbjGrVH.jpeg)

This is an official extension pack for Vic's Point Blank that adds weapons from the video-game Blue Archive.

As of v0.6, the pack features weapons from Abydos, Millenium Science School, the Gehenna Prefect Team, and some weapons from Problem Solver 68 and Arius Squad. Future updates will add more weapons from these teams and from more schools.

Pack requires version 2.0+ of VPB to have the dual-wielding feature. The pack works on the previous version, for 1.20.1 and 1.21.1, but will lack dual-wielding.

![wallpaper](https://i.imgur.com/4RIH57a.png)

Locate your directory--the same place where your mods folder, your resource packs folder, saves, etc. are at. Create a new folder in there called 'pointblank'

Inside this folder, put the content pack zip file you installed. You can have as many content packs in there as you want.

![wallpaper](https://i.imgur.com/nc9WLAi.png)

Done!

Once you load the game, the content pack will be installed. This process also works for installing content pack on servers. Be advised that players joining a server will also need to install the same content packs.

Alternatively, you can use the in-game menu to install packs:

![wallpaper](https://i.imgur.com/5yl3RSY.png)
